nodes.label: Android Round App Icon (xxxhdpi) — dragit
nodes.description: Round Android launcher icon at xxxhdpi density (192x192px). Depicts a stylized drag-and-drop motif on a white circular background: a bold dark-purple/indigo open arc (resembling the letter D) with two filled purple circles at its endpoints (top-right and bottom), and a red/coral filled circle with a matching diagonal red bar in the center foreground, suggesting a cursor or node being dragged. Color palette is indigo/purple and red/coral, consistent with the dragit brand identity.
